title: Brightness Plus
description: Allows you to set your brightness beyond default levels with enhanced controls
body:
# Brightness Plus – Go Beyond Default Brightness

**Brightness Plus** is a simple Fabric mod that lets you control your Minecraft brightness beyond the default limits. Whether you’re mining deep underground, exploring caves, or just want a clearer view, this mod gives you full control over how bright your world can be.  

[![Fast Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e81436885d7d199d80ffde632b0895d24a2c72b.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)

## Key Features
- Adjust brightness from **0% (default)** up to **1200%**  
- Set a custom **keybind** to toggle brightness on or off instantly  
- Fully compatible with Minecraft **1.21**  
- Lightweight and easy-to-use  
- Fabric-based (not Forge)  

If you’ve ever wished Minecraft was brighter and more customizable, **Brightness Plus** is the perfect solution. Stay in control of your visuals and play the way you like!  

## Compatability
- Sodium 
- Optifine
- Vulkan
